title: Tesla driver — multi-vehicle accident
sentences: Hello, I need help, I've been in an accident.
I'm on Highway 99 near Yuba City, I think around mile marker 42.
My car hit another vehicle, my airbag deployed.
I'm conscious but I have pain in my chest and left arm.
There's another car involved, I can see the driver is slumped over.
My Tesla is sending you my exact GPS coordinates right now.
Please hurry, there's smoke coming from the other car.
